tenses.label: Presente · Indicativo
tenses.description: Simple present tense for the irregular verb ir.

forms.eng: I go to the market.
You go to the market.
He or she goes to the market.
We go to the market.
You all go to the market.
They go to the market.

tenses.label: Pretérito · Indicativo
tenses.description: Simple past tense (pretérito indefinido) for ir, which shares forms with ser.

forms.eng: I went to the market yesterday.
You went to the market yesterday.
He or she went to the market yesterday.
We went to the market yesterday.
You all went to the market yesterday.
They went to the market yesterday.

tenses.label: Futuro · Indicativo
tenses.description: Simple future tense for the irregular verb ir.

forms.eng: I will go to the market tomorrow.
You will go to the market tomorrow.
He or she will go to the market tomorrow.
We will go to the market tomorrow.
You all will go to the market tomorrow.
They will go to the market tomorrow.

forms.ru: Я раньше ходил на рынок каждую неделю.
forms.eng: I used to go to the market every week.

forms.ru: Ты раньше ходил на рынок каждую неделю.
forms.eng: You used to go to the market every week.

forms.ru: Он/она раньше ходил(а) на рынок каждую неделю.
forms.eng: He or she used to go to the market every week.

forms.ru: Мы раньше ходили на рынок каждую неделю.
forms.eng: We used to go to the market every week.

forms.ru: Вы раньше ходили на рынок каждую неделю.
forms.eng: You all used to go to the market every week.

forms.ru: Они раньше ходили на рынок каждую неделю.
forms.eng: They used to go to the market every week.

tenses.label: Pretérito Perfecto · Indicativo
tenses.description: Present perfect (pretérito perfecto compuesto) for ir.

forms.eng: I have gone to the market.
You have gone to the market.
He or she has gone to the market.
We have gone to the market.
You all have gone to the market.
They have gone to the market.
Go to the market.
Go to the market, please.
Let's go to the market.
Go to the market, you all.
Go to the market, everyone.
Don't go to the market.
Please don't go to the market.

forms.ru: Давайте не будем ходить на рынок.
forms.eng: Let's not go to the market.
Don't go to the market, you all.
Don't go to the market, everyone.

forms.ru: Важно, чтобы я пошёл на рынок.
forms.eng: It is important that I go to the market.

forms.ru: Важно, чтобы ты пошёл на рынок.
forms.eng: It is important that you go to the market.

forms.ru: Важно, чтобы он/она пошёл(ла) на рынок.
forms.eng: It is important that he or she go to the market.

forms.ru: Важно, чтобы мы пошли на рынок.
forms.eng: It is important that we go to the market.

forms.ru: Важно, чтобы вы пошли на рынок.
forms.eng: It is important that you all go to the market.

forms.ru: Важно, чтобы они пошли на рынок.
forms.eng: It is important that they go to the market.

forms.ru: Жаль, что я уже сходил на рынок.
forms.eng: It is a pity that I have already gone to the market.

forms.ru: Жаль, что ты уже сходил на рынок.
forms.eng: It is a pity that you have already gone to the market.

forms.ru: Жаль, что он/она уже сходил(а) на рынок.
forms.eng: It is a pity that he or she has already gone to the market.

forms.ru: Жаль, что мы уже сходили на рынок.
forms.eng: It is a pity that we have already gone to the market.

forms.ru: Жаль, что вы уже сходили на рынок.
forms.eng: It is a pity that you all have already gone to the market.

forms.ru: Жаль, что они уже сходили на рынок.
forms.eng: It is a pity that they have already gone to the market.

forms.ru: Если бы я пошёл на рынок.
forms.eng: If I went to the market.

forms.ru: Если бы ты пошёл на рынок.
forms.eng: If you went to the market.

forms.ru: Если бы он/она пошёл(ла) на рынок.
forms.eng: If he or she went to the market.

forms.ru: Если бы мы пошли на рынок.
forms.eng: If we went to the market.

forms.ru: Если бы вы пошли на рынок.
forms.eng: If you all went to the market.

forms.ru: Если бы они пошли на рынок.
forms.eng: If they went to the market.
